top_three_improvements.summary: Hero and scroll-reveal sections now render visibly before hydration/screenshot timing instead of relying on initial opacity states.
Added verified public proof strip and replaced misleading menu/review CTAs with call-first verified phone paths.
Added mobile sticky call/directions CTA and tightened responsive header, hero, cards, and overflow behavior.

verification.visual_check: desktop/mobile hero, proof content, and CTAs render clearly; no screenshot blocker remained

heartbeat_summary: Antojitos improvement and top-3 gates completed locally: fixed blank/headless visibility risk, added verified public proof, corrected CTAs to call-first paths, and made mobile CTAs responsive. Next canonical stage is concierge; MC sync remains blocked by missing agency auth in this runtime.
